shortcuts: Shortcuts: ↑↓ move · Enter enter · Backspace back · Space mark · A actions
no_files: No files match the current filters. Clear filters (F).
permissions_error: Permissions error on some files. Retry or elevate permissions.
confirm_shortcuts: Keys: Y = Yes · N = No · Esc = Cancel
delete_in_progress: Trash operation already in progress, please wait...
recycle_bin_space_warning: Warning: Windows may have deleted some items permanently because the Recycle Bin had no room left.
recycle_bin_space_warning_short: Warning: Windows may have deleted items permanently.
recycle_bin_space_warning_some: Warning: {suspected} of {processed} items may have been permanently deleted.
recycle_bin_space_warning_some_short: Warning: possible permanent deletion of {suspected} of {processed}.
recycle_bin_overflow_prompt: Warning: the Recycle Bin only has {available} free and you are about to delete {size}. If you continue, Windows may delete the content permanently. Continue anyway?
recycle_bin_overflow_prompt_unknown: Could not verify Recycle Bin space. If you continue, Windows may delete the content permanently. Continue anyway?
recycle_bin_mixed_prompt: Heads up: {fit} of {total} items would fit (~{fit_size}). The other {overflow} (~{overflow_size}) may be permanently deleted. Continue? {preview}
recycle_bin_marginal_prompt: Heads up: the Recycle Bin would have very little free space left ({margin}). Windows may skip the bin and delete permanently. Continue?
mixed_shortcuts: Keys: Y = All · F = Only fit · N = No · Esc = Cancel
